creator: michael@meiszl.de
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #3)
I am a good follower :-))) no cuts.
As I said, I'm doing this for decades already, so freebsd-update is no mystery for me.

Obviously the 2nd "freebsd-update install" did not exchange the binaries. But it deleted the stored updates. 

So, if this is "incomplete", what to do next?
